narrative:
Moorefield Twp (precinct in Harrison County) has 280 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.4 percentage points.
